goal: Recalculate the BF3-TS2-B1 forward intrinsic reaction coordinate after the first run failed at point 21 through corrector oscillation.
claim_scope: Numerically trace the forward direction from the accepted C13-C21 first-order-saddle candidate. Do not assign reactant or product identity, claim an endpoint minimum, or validate the reaction path without endpoint review and the separately completed reverse direction.

failure_evidence.diagnosis: The modified Bulirsch-Stoer corrector oscillated between geometries and did not meet the 0.01 delta-x threshold; SCF, memory, and scheduler failure were not implicated.
